title: アオハル杯4戦目・あともう一歩

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This must be all my fault... Maybe the team's
better off without me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not right... Everyone said they need
me, and I believe them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to work harder and do my best for all of
them!
